data_quality_notes.maricopa_county: Party affiliations not published on official site except Galvin (R). Contact through web forms only.
data_quality_notes.pima_county: Website uses JavaScript rendering; data cross-referenced from county directory and search results.
data_quality_notes.mesa: Official website blocked scraping. Names and districts confirmed; contact details not available.
data_quality_notes.scottsdale: Names confirmed from nav structure. Individual contact details not scraped.
data_quality_notes.surprise: Website JavaScript-heavy. Only Patrick Duffy email confirmed; others follow convention.
data_quality_notes.flagstaff: All at-large seats. Only mayor email confirmed; council shares general line.
data_quality_notes.yuma_city: Website blocked scraping. Names from Ballotpedia and news sources.
data_quality_notes.goodyear: Only mayor and Kaino emails confirmed from official sources.
data_quality_notes.gila_county: Party affiliations not published on official county website.
data_quality_notes.mohave_county: Uses web contact forms instead of published email addresses.
